description_long: This is a wooden storage crate with a robust, rustic appearance, featuring a rectangular box shape reinforced by diagonal and horizontal wooden planks on each side. The wood grain is visibly textured, giving the crate a weathered, utilitarian look suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. Metal rivets secure the planks at the corners, enhancing its structural integrity and adding to its rugged aesthetic. One side of the crate displays a small white label with a black upward arrow, likely indicating the correct orientation for handling or stacking. The top of the crate is flat and bordered by a thick wooden frame, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, suggesting the crate is accessed by removing or prying off the top panel.
description: A rugged, wooden storage crate with reinforced planks, visible wood grain, and metal rivets, featuring a label with an upward arrow on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing a diagonal wooden plank and textured wood grain, with no visible labels.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar diagonal plank and wood texture, no labels or markings visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view featuring a diagonal plank and a white label with a black upward arrow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a diagonal plank, no labels or markings visible.
